Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. MATTHEW A. SIROKA, TEL. NO. 522-1105 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. JENNIFER WEINER APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SF BREW INCORPORATED DBA CLUB 445.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF SAM AND TROY PRODUCTIONS' Motion For Preliminary Injunction IS DENIED. THE EVIDENCE BEFORE THE COURT SHOWS THAT MISCONDUCT IS NOT LIKELY TO RECUR AND THE PARTIES AGAINST WHOM THE INJUNCTION IS SOUGHT ARE NOT IN A MOTION TO CAUSE MORE DAMAGE OR ALTER THEIR BEHAVIOR IN LIGHT OF ANY INJUNCTION HAVING GIVEN UP MANAGEMENT. SHOULD NEW FACTS CHANGE, PLAINTIFFS ARE FREE TO SEEK FURTHER RELIEF. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR # 5208 =301/PJB/BD
